productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Washed blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has a looped waist with a zipper fly and button closure, two pockets on the front with a patch pocket above the right one that has an embroidered brand logo, two pockets at the back with stitch detailing, contrast coloured buttons and stitch detailing Fit Skinny fit Regular rise Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade This pair of jeans from Deni-yo is that perfect contour-friendly pair you have been lusting for. Designed for the denim wearer, and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky t-shirts or classy casual shirts, and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is of length 44.5" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
